form.layout: ==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== assetId[资产ID] orgId[所属组织] period[折旧期间] status[执行状态] executedAt[执行时间] voucherId[凭证ID] businessDate[业务日期] ==========>amount[金额信息]====== currencyId[币种] exchangeRate[汇率] amountSource[源币种金额] amountFunctional[本位币金额] plannedAmount[计划折旧额] actualAmount[实际折旧额] accumulatedDepreciation[累计折旧] netBookValue[净值] ==========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== assetId[资产ID] orgId[所属组织] period[折旧期间] status[执行状态] executedAt[执行时间] voucherId[凭证ID] businessDate[业务日期] ==========>amount[金额信息]====== currencyId[币种] exchangeRate[汇率] amountSource[源币种金额] amountFunctional[本位币金额] plannedAmount[计划折旧额] actualAmount[实际折旧额] accumulatedDepreciation[累计折旧] netBookValue[净值] remark[备注](2)

form.title: 查询条件
